children.heading: Assistance in form of funds
children.label: a Assistance in form of funds
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated $20,000,000 for each fiscal year ending after , to provide under this chapter Federal law enforcement assistance in the form of funds.September 30, 2022

children.heading: Assistance other than funds
children.label: b Assistance other than funds
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each fiscal year ending after , such sums as may be necessary to provide under this chapter Federal law enforcement assistance other than funds.September 30, 1984
